description: Benchmark tests for phase-a-planner skill - Ten-Step Cycle Phase A orchestration (A.1 Spec, A.2 Tasks, A.3 Agent allocation)

evals.name: full-cycle-execution
evals.prompt: Execute Phase A for new feature: Add OAuth2 social login support (GitHub + Google). No existing spec. Run A.1 → A.2 → A.3 in sequence.

assertions.name: executes_a1_spec_creation
assertions.description: Should invoke A.1 spec-drafter to create proposal.md

assertions.name: executes_a2_task_planning
assertions.description: Should invoke A.2 task-planner after spec creation

assertions.name: executes_a3_agent_allocation
assertions.description: Should invoke A.3 agent allocation as final step

assertions.name: sequential_step_order
assertions.description: Steps must execute in A.1 → A.2 → A.3 order

evals.name: skip-condition-detection
evals.prompt: Evaluate Phase A for: Fix typo in README.md, single file change, no logic impact. Should detect Level 1 skip condition.

assertions.name: detects_skip_condition
assertions.description: Should detect Level 1 skip - no spec needed for trivial change

assertions.name: does_not_create_spec
assertions.description: Should NOT invoke spec-drafter for trivial changes

assertions.name: explains_skip_reason
assertions.description: Should explain why spec is not needed

evals.name: existing-spec-detection
evals.prompt: Execute Phase A for feature: Add user profile avatar upload. Existing file found: openspec/changes/add-avatar-upload/proposal.md

assertions.name: detects_existing_proposal
assertions.description: Should detect existing proposal.md and skip A.1
assertions.check: output.includes('existing') || output.includes('found') || output.includes('already exists') || output.includes('跳过 A.1')

assertions.name: skips_a1_step
assertions.description: Should skip A.1 spec creation since proposal already exists
assertions.check: output.includes('skip A.1') || output.includes('A.1: skip') || output.includes('A.1 已完成') || output.includes('proposal.md exists')

assertions.name: proceeds_to_a2
assertions.description: Should proceed directly to A.2 task planning

evals.name: yaml-output-format
evals.prompt: Execute Phase A for: Implement real-time notifications via WebSocket. Generate execution plan with step status.

assertions.name: has_execution_plan
assertions.description: Should output an execution plan structure

assertions.name: includes_step_status
assertions.description: Each step should show its status (pending/completed/skipped)

assertions.name: lists_all_three_steps
assertions.description: Output must reference all three phase steps A.1, A.2, A.3

evals.name: error-recovery
evals.prompt: Execute Phase A. State-scanner reports: uncommitted changes in 3 files, working tree dirty. Feature: Add payment gateway integration.

assertions.name: detects_unclean_state
assertions.description: Should detect and report unclean working tree state

assertions.name: blocks_or_warns
assertions.description: Should block execution or issue a clear warning
assertions.check: output.includes('WARNING') || output.includes('BLOCKED') || output.includes('cannot proceed') || output.includes('stash') || output.includes('警告')

assertions.name: provides_resolution_steps
assertions.description: Should provide steps to resolve the unclean state
assertions.check: output.includes('git stash') || output.includes('commit') || output.includes('resolve') || output.includes('clean') || output.includes('action')
